frame_analyses.description: Title slide showing 'Marbles and scope right hand' with instructional text
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Video introduces the task with zero-degree scope control using right hand controller

frame_analyses.description: Instructional slide explaining task rules: move green marbles right, orange marbles left, use empty bucket in middle for maneuvering space
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear instruction on marble segregation strategy and use of empty bucket

frame_analyses.description: 3D view of simulator showing initial layout: green marbles on left, orange on right, empty bucket in center, scope view from above
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup showing 2 green and 2 orange marbles visible in box arrangement

frame_analyses.description: Demonstration of grasping technique with instruction 'Grab the marble gently with the tip of your instrument. Moving too fast will result in pinching the floor or bucket.'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Shows proper gentle grasping to avoid contact with surfaces

frame_analyses.description: Right hand controller moving orange marble from right position toward center bucket; text: 'Move the orange marbles to the left (0/2). Move the green marbles to the right (0/2).'
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrating controlled midair transfer with zero-degree scope tracking

frame_analyses.description: Orange marble being placed in center bucket with instruction 'Drop the marble above the bucket'
Second orange marble being transferred from right side toward center bucket
Green marble being picked up and transferred from left side; progress shown as (1/2) orange marbles moved
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Efficient alternation between orange and green marble handling

frame_analyses.description: Second green marble being moved to right side; progress at (1/2) for both colors
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Maintaining balanced transfer between both marble types

frame_analyses.description: Orange marble in flight being moved to left side with progress (1/2)
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Using bucket space to navigate around marbles efficiently

frame_analyses.description: Final orange marble being placed in left bucket; progress (2/2) for orange marbles
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Completing orange marble segregation to left side

frame_analyses.description: Final green marble being moved to right side with progress (2/2) for green marbles
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Completing final marble placement; all marbles segregated correctly

frame_analyses.description: Final state showing all orange marbles on left, all green marbles on right, center bucket empty
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completed successfully with all marbles in correct positions

notes: This is an INSTRUCTIONAL video demonstrating the Peg Transfer task (marble segregation variant). The video contains educational narration and overlay text explaining task objectives, proper grasping technique, and marble movement strategy. It is not a performance video of an actual trainee attempting the task under time constraints.
video_classification_rationale: This video is classified as 'instructional' rather than 'performance' because: (1) It contains title slides and explanatory text overlays, (2) Narrated instructions appear throughout ('Grab the marble gently...', 'Move the orange marbles to the left...'), (3) On-screen progress tracking (0/2, 1/2, 2/2) is a teaching feature, (4) The 'SIMULATOR LAP' watermark indicates this is a recorded tutorial, and (5) There is no timing pressure or formal scoring context—the demonstration is paced for educational clarity rather than speed.

score_components.reason: Instructional video; scoring only applies to performance and expert_demo classifications

demonstrated_techniques: Zero-degree laparoscope control with right hand controller
Gentle marble grasping at instrument tip to avoid surface contact
Midair marble transfer using controlled instrument motion
Vertical placement above container to prevent collision
Sequential alternation between marble types for efficient sorting
Use of central empty bucket as maneuvering space
verbal_cues: Grab the marble gently with the tip of your instrument.
Moving too fast will result in pinching the floor or bucket.
Follow the controller with your scope.
Move the orange marbles to the left and the green marbles to the right.
Drop the marble above the bucket.
Moving the camera too fast or uncontrolled will result in misorientation or dizziness.
common_errors_addressed: Grasping too hard or too quickly, causing marbles to slip or buckets to collapse
Failing to track instrument movement with scope camera, causing loss of orientation
Rapid uncontrolled scope movement leading to disorientation
Inefficient sequencing that requires repeated re-positioning

confidence_rationale: Video classification is certain based on explicit instructional elements (title slides, narrated instructions, progress overlays, watermarks, educational pacing). No performance scoring is applicable.
